summary: Attacker observed signature reuse in Anyswap router V3, recovered the shared MPC private key, and drained two pools.
attack_trace: Detect ECDSA nonce reuse across two router signatures
Recover private key via deterministic-k attack
Sign arbitrary swapOut messages and drain pools
root_cause: MPC implementation reused the deterministic k value across signed messages, leaking the private key shard.
